arts.ttl: How Manchester United should line up in crucial Europa League fixture vs Real Sociedad
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Samuel Luckhurst, Tyrone Marshall, George Smith)
arts.sum: Man United take on Real Sociedad in the second leg of their Europa League round-of-16 tie at Old Trafford on tonight.

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Ruben Amorim challenges players after brutal Sir Jim Ratcliffe remark
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim is calling on his underperforming Manchester United stars to prove Sir Jim Ratcliffe wrong starting with tonight's meeting against Real Sociedad at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Man Utd vs Real Sociedad: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Man Utd host Real Sociedad in the Europa League last 16. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: 'Underperforming' Man Utd can change Ratcliffe's mind - Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim says "underperforming" squad can change Sir Jim Ratcliffe's opinion.

arts.ttl: 'We don't want to play like this in the future' - Amorim on Man Utd draw
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim says his side "cannot play like that" in future but praises how "competitive" The Red Devils were in their hard-fought 1-1 draw with Premier League title chasers Arsenal.

arts.ttl: 'Underperforming' Man Utd can change Ratcliffe's mind - Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim says "underperforming" squad can change Sir Jim Ratcliffe's opinion.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim reacts to Sir Jim Ratcliffe's criticism of Man Utd players
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim speaks to the media for the first time since Sir Jim Ratcliffe's bombshell comments about the state of Manchester United.

arts.ttl: 'Underperforming' Man Utd can change Ratcliffe's mind - Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim says "underperforming" squad can change Sir Jim Ratcliffe's opinion.

arts.ttl: Watch: Man Utd release images of new stadium
arts.sum: Look at plans for Manchester United's new stadium as they aim to build an "iconic" new 100,000-seater ground close to Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Watch: Iconic Man Utd goals at Old Trafford
arts.sum: Watch the best goals scored by Manchester United at Old Trafford, as the club announces plans to move into a new stadium.
